Setting up the tent is easy and the space is AMAZING!! I am 5'3" and I can stand straight up in the middle. HOWEVER, the poles need to be stronger/ thicker!! We had a quick thunderstorm sweep through with 60mph winds and it snapped the fiberglass poles on the same side of the tent. That then led to the inside of the tent getting wet. They are not able to be fixed easily and I ended up with fiberglass shards in my hands. Other than that, the tent is VERY amazing and worth it! Once we were able to DIY fix the poles for the weekend, the tent stayed dry!I suggest that if possible to purchase other poles that could stand up to weather, with that I definitely recommend this tent.

These are most pointless sunglasses I have ever had. You know how those cardboard 3D glasses you get in a cereal box (or used to...) are super flat in the front and sit far away from the outside edges of each eye? Yeah, these are worse. Bright day coming up? Want to block out the rays? Don't use these. They're about as effective as lipstick on a pig. It's like you put the tip of your nose against a slightly tinted window pane and then somehow that stayed attached to your face.Not giving it a lower rating because they don't scratch as easily as other sunglasses at a similar price. And so far the UV/Tinting hasn't bubbled.I've relegated these to my 'drawer of misfits' along with a random sock, dried out ChapStick, and a cotton ball. They're all about equally useful.

These jeans appear to be a good value. They are also fairly comfortable.The problem is that all three pairs I've had developed a tear in the exact same spot. The first pair it took a few months of wearing and washing about once per week. So I ordered a second pair. The very first wear they developed the same tear as the first. I returned fhem for a replacement. The replacement pair has now also developed that same tear in the same location. This time on the third wearing & laundering.At this point it is obvious that a weak point in the fabric or construction is the problem. I am disabled and not very active. I am not working, running, or anything else crazy in these jeans.Otherwise they seem fine. If the tear wasn't in the location it is, right next to the bottom of the zipper, I wouldn't even care.

I am a long time user of Sony linkbuds and had a few pairs. And out of all the pairs of linkbuds overall they were good but was looking for something better. I got the Bose QC ultras and the noise cancellation on those is unmatched, but the app functionality and headphone connection issues were not like Sonys app or ambient sound control. So I returned the Bose and got these Sony XM5 buds and they are everything I hoped. No issues with them as of yet, the sound quality of the music is definitely an upgrade from the link buds. The app control and what you do with the Sony is still top for me.

We purchased a unit in January of 2024. The machine worked for about a month before it started smelling like smoke and stopped working. We contacted the company and they eventually sent a technician who said the motor and control board needed replacing. After about a month, the parts came and it was replaced only for the same thing to happen within 2-3 weeks. The motor and control board were replaced several times before the company opted to send us a new unit. The new unit arrived in early August and by September the same problem happened. After a month, a technician was sent and once again said the motor and control board needed replacing. Since the warranty is only good for a year and we feared the machine would just keep breaking past the warranty period, we asked the company to simply refund the money and they said since it was purchased through Amazon they could not do it. While the customer service department has attempted to keep the units working, it doesn't change the fact that we basically have a very expensive paperweight in our house that has only worked for less than 3 months in the 10 months we have had it. We are currently in the process of trying to contact Amazon through their rather not user friendly customer service system to see if anything can be done, but we are not getting our hopes up.We have come to the conclusion that the problem is simply that the machine is not meant for daily home use as advertised. We only walked on the machine at speeds of under 3mph. The machine was lubricated and cared for according to directions, but the motor is just not powerful enough for daily use. If you are purchasing this treadmill as part of a new year's resolution and plan to only use it for 3 weeks before giving up on it or if you exercise very sporadically, then it might work for you. If you actually want to make a lifestyle change and walk on a daily basis to improve your health, then you are better off looking somewhere else. One of the many technicians that came to service the machine recommended getting a unit with at least a 4hp motor. If we decide to risk purchasing another treadmill, we will look for a better, more reliable option.

I only do my banking, check email, have a few word docs, and some other items. I am not a gamer nor do I have multiple tabs open at one time. I also do not have a lot of apps on my computer. If I were to fly to Hawaii the computer would be dead upon arrival. Very disappointing and not worth the money.

I recently purchased this vacuum, and overall, I’m really impressed! The suction power is fantastic—it picks up dirt, dust, and even pet hair with ease. My carpets look brand new, and it works just as well on hardwood floors.Assembly was a breeze. I had it out of the box and ready to use in under 10 minutes. No complicated instructions or extra tools required, which is always a plus.For the price, this vacuum is an absolute steal. It performs like models that cost twice as much, so it’s definitely a great value.The only downside is the smaller cleaning head. While it’s great for tight spaces and corners, it does mean you’ll need to make more passes to cover larger areas. It’s not a dealbreaker, but it does add a little extra time to your cleaning routine.Overall, this vacuum is a solid choice for anyone looking for powerful suction and great value. If you don’t mind the smaller cleaning head, it’s definitely worth the investment!

These are really some of the best earbuds currently in the market. Sound was lackluster at first because none of the included ear tips worked for me. That foam material that Sony uses doesn't work for all people, perhaps that's why other manufacturers like Apple, Sennheiser and B&W use silicone tips (which also are easier to clean and age better). Once I bought compatible silicone ear tips (link below), I got a good seal and was able to truly enjoy these earbuds.Pros:- Excellent sound quality. I would say they sound better than Apple AirPods Pro.- The mobile App includes an equalizer to tune them exactly the way you want them.- Last firmware allows you to use head gestures to control them.- Full-featured mobile App.- Construction is great. Both the earbuds and case are solidly built.- Good noise cancellation- Smaller and lighter than the previous version.Cons:- Although noise cancellation is good, it's not as good as Apple's AirPods Pro.- Mobile App is a little convoluted to navigate, but it's not too bad.Neutral:- Although they are smaller than the previous version, they still protrude out of your ears more than other offerings like Apple AirPods. They are on-par to other offerings like Sennheiser Momentum Wireless 3 and B&W, so it's not too bad.These are the ear tips I used. They work great:

The item is exactly as described. I did not notice that the package says no aroma, and I am disappointed in that because I wanted the almond scent.. So if you are looking for a scent-free almond oil...this is it. The package also states that the flavor is very subtle...indeed it is, so subtle that I cannot taste it at all; I typically like strong flavors. Unsure at this point if I will order again, there are some very good uses for unscented oils, but those were not my intention. Totally my own fault for not reading everything before placing my order, it is clearly stated on the product packaging.
